positive: A highly detailed, stylized celestial botanical illustration featuring bioluminescent flora and fauna set against a deep indigo and sapphire cosmic void. The composition is centered and designed as a striking silhouette print. Elements include giant glowing mushrooms, swirling nebulae mimicking silk, intricate root structures, and crystalline celestial petals. Use dramatic rim lighting and high contrast black and white inks, with pops of luminous neon turquoise and ethereal violet. The style should be a mix of Art Nouveau organic flow and modern scientific diagram aesthetic, optimized for screen printing on apparel. Perfect symmetry, clean lines, maximal detail, isolated on a dark background.
